tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: SAVING OUR WILDLIFE
tasks.text: Many animal species are in 1.1. ________ because of human activity. The destruction of 1.2. ________ habitats forces animals to leave their homes. 1.3. ________ of rivers and forests makes it harder for wildlife to find clean water and food. Some 1.4. ________ kill rare animals illegally, which is a serious crime. Without proper 1.5. ________, many 1.6. ________ creatures may vanish forever. The 1.7. ________ of entire species would be a tragedy for our planet. Fortunately, many organisations work 1.8. ________ to save endangered animals. National parks and nature reserves give wildlife a safe place to live and grow.
